description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully as a baseline before making changes.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/ClearMind to install all dependencies
Run npm run build to verify the project compiles without errors
Confirm the build output is generated in the dist/ directory
acceptance_criteria: npm run build completes without errors and produces output in dist/
verification: Run npm run build and confirm exit code is 0
findings: npm install and npm run build both succeed. Build produces dist/ with expected output. 2 vulnerabilities (non-blocking). Build warns about chunk size >500KB which is pre-existing.
